rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for correct description 'Arrearagia continued' based on visual verification. Both agreed on header type and no amounts.

Selected gemini-flash for correct description 'Alixe d Rents, variable' based on visual verification, supported by its specific note on the ornate handwriting. Both agreed on header type and no amounts.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'Long.' description, and amount of 172 pounds, 7 shillings, 11 pence, and 0.5 fraction (½ symbol clearly visible). claude-haiku missed pence and fraction.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Smith. Kewington Do' and blank shillings/pence columns. Empty strings represent truly blank columns better than 0.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Merton Do' and blank shillings/pence columns. Empty strings represent truly blank columns better than 0.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Yardington Do. & Tent' and amounts of 65 pounds, 19 shillings, 1 pence, and 0.5 fraction (½ symbol clearly visible). claude-haiku missed pence and fraction.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Chase. Hill' and amounts of 19 pounds, 7 shillings, and 2 pence. claude-haiku misread description, shillings, and pence.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Kiddington Mills' and amounts of 28 pounds, 6 shillings, and 10 pence. claude-haiku misread description and pence.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Garrington, Sadler Three Years' and amounts of 35 pounds, 1 shilling, 11 pence, and 0.75 fraction (¾ symbol clearly visible). claude-haiku misread description and missed pence/fraction.
Selected gemini-flash for correct description 'Do Prickett'. Both extractors correctly identified the amounts: 14 pounds, 2 shillings, 5 pence, and 0.5 fraction (½ or 'ob' symbol).

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Tintinhull, Napier, Three Years' and amounts of 29 pounds, 6 shillings, and 1 pence. claude-haiku misread 'hull' as 'hoe' and missed the pence digit.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Do Beaton, Six Years' and amounts of 8 pounds, 10 shillings, and 1 pence. claude-haiku misread 'Beaton' as 'Boston' and missed the pence digit.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Clifton Terry' and amounts of 12 pounds, 19 shillings, 11 pence, and 0.5 fraction (½ symbol clearly visible). claude-haiku misread 'Terry' as 'Ferry' and missed pence/fraction.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Bensington Do'. Amounts are 11 pounds, 2 shillings, with a dash indicating no whole pence, and a 0.25 fraction (¼ symbol). gemini-flash's note accurately explains the dash for pence.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'So. Kewington Tent' and amounts of 4 pounds, 5 shillings, 1 pence, and 0.75 fraction (¾ symbol clearly visible). claude-haiku misread 'So.' as 'No.' and misinterpreted pence and fraction.
Consensus across both extractors for description, type, and absence of amounts. Visual verification confirms.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Taylor, two Years' and amounts of 22 pounds, 5 shillings, 2 pence, and 0.5 fraction (½ symbol clearly visible). claude-haiku missed the whole pence digit.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Judge Do' and amounts of 10 pounds, 18 shillings, 9 pence, and 0.5 fraction (½ symbol clearly visible). claude-haiku missed 'Do' in description and misread pence and fraction.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Atsons Do' and amounts of 10 pounds, 5 shillings, 11 pence, and 0.5 fraction (½ symbol clearly visible). claude-haiku misread description and missed the whole pence digit.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Gardiner, Burdon's Do' and amounts of 17 pounds, 1 shilling. A dash is present in the pence column, indicating no whole pence, so "" is preferred over 0.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Hartley Do' and amounts of 2 pounds, 18 shillings, 6 pence, and 0.25 fraction (¼ symbol clearly visible). claude-haiku added a comma to the description and misread pence and fraction.
